ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All providers use OpenAI-compatible API format
ast.target: 所有提供方均使用兼容 OpenAI 的 API 格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ollama: localhost:11434 | LM Studio: localhost:1234 | vLLM: localhost:8000
ast.target: Ollama: localhost:11434 | LM Studio: localhost:1234 | vLLM: localhost:8000

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for OpenAI. For local servers, use 'not-needed'
ast.target: OpenAI 必填。本地服务器请使用“not-needed”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model for chat and text processing — type a name or browse from server
ast.target: 用于聊天和文本处理的模型——输入名称或从服务器浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model for RAG indexing — type a name or browse from server
ast.target: 用于 RAG 索引的模型——输入名称或从服务器浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of previous messages to include (0-3)
ast.target: 要包含的历史消息数量（0-3）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show response word by word as it generates. Your server must have CORS enabled for streaming to work.
ast.target: 生成时逐词显示回复。要使流式传输工作，服务器必须启用 CORS。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap response in custom text (e.g., code blocks)
ast.target: 用自定义文本包裹响应（例如代码块）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Strip <think>, <reasoning>, <thought> blocks from output (useful for Qwen, DeepSeek)
ast.target: 从输出中移除 <think>、<reasoning>、<thought> 块（对 Qwen、DeepSeek 有用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: JSON array of marker pairs to strip from responses
ast.target: 用于从响应中移除的标记对 JSON 数组

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by 'Text: Run custom prompt' command
ast.target: 由“Text: Run custom prompt”命令使用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Build searchable index of all notes in vault
ast.target: 为库中的所有笔记构建可搜索索引

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of files in current index
ast.target: 当前索引中的文件数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which search API to use for web and news search
ast.target: 选择用于网页和新闻搜索的搜索 API

ast.name: warn
warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: When tracing in manual flush mode, you must call `await client.flush()` manually to submit trace batches.
ast.target: [WARNING]: 在手动刷新模式下进行追踪时，必须手动调用 `await client.flush()` 以提交追踪批次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid LANGSMITH_RUNS_ENDPOINTS – must be valid JSON array of objects with api_url and api_key properties, or object mapping url->apiKey
ast.target: 无效的 LANGSMITH_RUNS_ENDPOINTS——必须是包含 api_url 和 api_key 属性的对象的有效 JSON 数组，或将 url 映射到 apiKey 的对象

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to calculate number of tokens, falling back to approximate count
ast.target: 无法计算 token 数量，回退为近似计数

ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 视图

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 人格已恢复为默认设置

ast.target: 索引时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.source: Error generating text. Check plugin console for details.
ast.target: 生成文本时出错。请在插件控制台查看详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error communicating with LLM server. Check plugin console for details.

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a helpful assistant that generates relevant hashtags.
ast.target: 你是一个能生成相关话题标签的有用助手。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a helpful writing assistant. Provide clear, concise responses. When editing text, preserve the author's voice unless asked to change it.
ast.target: 你是一个有用的写作助手。请提供清晰、简洁的回复。编辑文本时，请保留作者的语气，除非被要求更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ask questions about your notes. I'll find relevant content and answer based on what's in your vault.
ast.target: 针对你的笔记提问。我会找到相关内容并根据你的知识库进行回答。
